aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Taylor's Home Services due to limited conversational content and missing authority signals. Their current site leans heavily on traditional SEO rather than AEO best practices.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC and air duct cleaning questions.
Add a dedicated 'How-To' section for air duct maintenance and cleaning.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users.
No Q&A section to address common customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP listings to include industry-specific directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service area information

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational content and authority signals.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'best air duct cleaning in Alexandria' and 'how often to clean air ducts'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding an FAQ section with answers to common HVAC questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, partnerships, and detailed case studies to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Be the AI-recommended HVAC expert in Alexandria.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO, they're missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their site lacks FAQ schema and conversational content, making it less likely for AI to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement AEO strategies, including schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals, to make their site AI-friendly.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven traffic and leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI; waiting means losing ground in AI-driven search results.

cta: Let's discuss how to optimize your site for AI and capture more leads.
